description: CompositionCotton round neck t-shirt in black with white stripe detailing along the shoulders and minimalist seam detailing on the sidesFittingComfortWash careHandwash or machine washThis bold black t-shirt from adidas is infused with sporty energy. The classic white stripes detailing along the shoulders gives it a bold energetic vibe. The minimalist seam detailing on the sides towards the back gives it a cool edge. Wear it when you go out with friends or for any sporting activity and you will surely stand out from the rest.
